nasb.text: They read from the book, from the law of God, translating to give the sense so that they understood the reading.

esv.text: They read from the book, from the Law of God, clearly, and they gave the sense, so that the people understood the reading.

cnv.text: 他們宣讀　神的律法，把意義清楚翻譯出來，使眾民明白所宣讀的。

ccb.text: 他们宣读上帝的律法书，并解释清楚，使民众明白所宣读的。
